title: SeedSmith: LLM-Driven Seed Synthesis for Directed Fuzzing
snippet: Directed fuzzing steers fuzzers toward user-defined sink functions to identify vulnerabilities, but it frequently fails to trigger crashes even after long campaigns. We identify two challenges that prevent directed fuzzers from exposing crashes: incomplete static analysis of indirect calls, which leaves reachable paths invisible to distance-based guidance, and lack of semantic guidance for crash p
